description: A maintenance planner is creating the work package for an upcoming C-check on a commercial airliner.

nodes.task_description: Generate the list of all routine maintenance tasks required for a C-check from the aircraft's maintenance program.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a master list of all standard C-check tasks.

nodes.task_description: Incorporate any outstanding non-routine repair tasks and service bulletins for that specific aircraft.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent adds aircraft-specific repairs to the work package.

nodes.task_description: Estimate the total man-hours and required ground support equipment, and schedule the C-check in an available MRO hangar.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a complete plan and books the maintenance event.
